name: MONARCH CASINO & RESORT INC
summary: Monarch Casino & Resort Inc. owns and operates two hotel-casino properties: Atlantis Casino Resort Spa in Reno, Nevada, featuring ~61,000 sq ft of casino space, 817 hotel rooms, eight restaurants, and a spa; and Monarch Casino Resort Spa Black Hawk in Black Hawk, Colorado, featuring ~60,000 sq ft of casino space, 516 hotel rooms, four restaurants, and a spa. Revenue is generated through casino gaming, hotel, food and beverage, and spa operations.

products.name: Atlantis Casino Resort Spa
products.description: Hotel and casino in Reno, NV with ~61,000 sq ft casino, 817 rooms, 8 restaurants, spa, and convention space.

products.name: Monarch Casino Resort Spa Black Hawk
products.description: Hotel and casino in Black Hawk, CO with ~60,000 sq ft casino, 516 rooms, 4 restaurants, and spa.

products.name: Atlantis Mobile Race and Sports Betting App
products.description: Mobile sports and race betting app available to patrons physically located in Nevada.

products.name: Monarch Black Hawk Mobile Sports Betting App
products.description: Mobile sports betting app available to patrons physically located in Colorado.

partnerships.description: 20-year parking lot lease for ~4.2 acres adjacent to Atlantis property, providing ~300 additional parking spaces for guests.
Atlantis is the only hotel physically connected to the Reno-Sparks Convention Center via an enclosed skywalk.
